TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: bniru:Sabi Nobu trakis trakis. ini krahu kinryasan su trakis trakis. nya na tunux rom qu cipoq qbuci su trakis trakis. khmay balay squliq mita ga puqun naha mita baha hmswa cipuq sinrxan su trakis trakis, seng kbhul kawas kahul squ sunan pqyanux kwara lelaqi kinbahan na Tayal trakis trakis qutux cipuq nqu bway ungat krahu qpzing nya siga kahul squ qutux hnlan pcqun kwara bway trakis lga thuyay manga kwara Tayal. trakis trakis qutux cipuq sinrxan na ghap trakis, mzyup squ zik rhiyal mstmaq ru mhuqil lga t'aring tmangu ru mhbku mkrayas qbuci na trakis, cingay ryax ru byacing wayal kryasan lga siktay mhtuw cingay balay bway na trakis la kbwayun bway na trakis sikmwa t'rung rhiyal qu tunux nya trakis trakis musa saku psulung sunan tr'roq inlungan mu, nya na pbwayun bway na trakis insuna tninun mu trakis trakis ungat kkyalan kmayal sinrxan su, qutux cipuq nqu bway trakis ga qutux nqu tayal, nanu siki psqutux inlungan kwara tayal, thuyay srhu balay tasaw ru pinqasan cinqlangan na Tayal
S.PHON: βniru:s~ɕaβi noβu trakis~ɕ trakis~ɕ. ini kraħu kinrjas~ɕan s~ɕu trakis~ɕ trakis~ɕ. nja na tunux rom qu ʦ~ʨipoq qβuʦ~ʨi s~ɕu trakis~ɕ trakis~ɕ. kħmaj βalaj s~ɕquliq mita ɣa puqun naħa mita βaħa ħms~ɕwa ʦ~ʨipuq s~ɕinrxan s~ɕu trakis~ɕ trakis~ɕ, s~ɕeŋ kβħul kawas~ɕ kaħul s~ɕqu s~ɕunan pqjanux kwara lelaqi kinβaħan na tajal trakis~ɕ trakis~ɕ qutux ʦ~ʨipuq nqu βwaj uŋat kraħu qpziŋ nja s~ɕiɣa kaħul s~ɕqu qutux ħnlan pʦ~ʨqun kwara βwaj trakis~ɕ lɣa tħujaj maŋa kwara tajal. trakis~ɕ trakis~ɕ qutux ʦ~ʨipuq s~ɕinrxan na ɣħap trakis~ɕ, mzjup s~ɕqu zik rħijal ms~ɕtmaq ru mħuqil lɣa tʔariŋ tmaŋu ru mħβku mkrajas~ɕ qβuʦ~ʨi na trakis~ɕ, ʦ~ʨiŋaj rjax ru βjaʦ~ʨiŋ wajal krjas~ɕan lɣa s~ɕiktaj mħtuw ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj βwaj na trakis~ɕ la kβwajun βwaj na trakis~ɕ s~ɕikmwa tʔruŋ rħijal qu tunux nja trakis~ɕ trakis~ɕ mus~ɕa s~ɕaku ps~ɕuluŋ s~ɕunan trʔroq inluŋan mu, nja na pβwajun βwaj na trakis~ɕ ins~ɕuna tninun mu trakis~ɕ trakis~ɕ uŋat kkjalan kmajal s~ɕinrxan s~ɕu, qutux ʦ~ʨipuq nqu βwaj trakis~ɕ ɣa qutux nqu tajal, nanu s~ɕiki ps~ɕqutux inluŋan kwara tajal, tħujaj s~ɕrħu βalaj tas~ɕaw ru pinqas~ɕan ʦ~ʨinqlaŋan na tajal
S.FORM: bniru:Sabi Nobu trakis trakis. ini krahu kinryasan su trakis trakis. nya na tunux rom qu cipoq qbuci su trakis trakis. khmay balay squliq mita ga puqun naha mita baha hmswa cipuq sinrxan su trakis trakis, seng kbhul kawas kahul squ sunan pqyanux kwara lelaqi kinbahan na Tayal trakis trakis qutux cipuq nqu bway ungat krahu qpzing nya siga kahul squ qutux hnlan pcqun kwara bway trakis lga thuyay manga kwara Tayal. trakis trakis qutux cipuq sinrxan na ghap trakis, mzyup squ zik rhiyal mstmaq ru mhuqil lga t'aring tmangu ru mhbku mkrayas qbuci na trakis, cingay ryax ru byacing wayal kryasan lga siktay mhtuw cingay balay bway na trakis la kbwayun bway na trakis sikmwa t'rung rhiyal qu tunux nya trakis trakis musa saku psulung sunan tr'roq inlungan mu, nya na pbwayun bway na trakis insuna tninun mu trakis trakis ungat kkyalan kmayal sinrxan su, qutux cipuq nqu bway trakis ga qutux nqu tayal, nanu siki psqutux inlungan kwara tayal, thuyay srhu balay tasaw ru pinqasan cinqlangan na Tayal
S.PHON: βniru:s~ɕaβi noβu trakis~ɕ trakis~ɕ. ini kraħu kinrjas~ɕan s~ɕu trakis~ɕ trakis~ɕ. nja na tunux rom qu ʦ~ʨipoq qβuʦ~ʨi s~ɕu trakis~ɕ trakis~ɕ. kħmaj βalaj s~ɕquliq mita ɣa puqun naħa mita βaħa ħms~ɕwa ʦ~ʨipuq s~ɕinrxan s~ɕu trakis~ɕ trakis~ɕ, s~ɕeŋ kβħul kawas~ɕ kaħul s~ɕqu s~ɕunan pqjanux kwara lelaqi kinβaħan na tajal trakis~ɕ trakis~ɕ qutux ʦ~ʨipuq nqu βwaj uŋat kraħu qpziŋ nja s~ɕiɣa kaħul s~ɕqu qutux ħnlan pʦ~ʨqun kwara βwaj trakis~ɕ lɣa tħujaj maŋa kwara tajal. trakis~ɕ trakis~ɕ qutux ʦ~ʨipuq s~ɕinrxan na ɣħap trakis~ɕ, mzjup s~ɕqu zik rħijal ms~ɕtmaq ru mħuqil lɣa tʔariŋ tmaŋu ru mħβku mkrajas~ɕ qβuʦ~ʨi na trakis~ɕ, ʦ~ʨiŋaj rjax ru βjaʦ~ʨiŋ wajal krjas~ɕan lɣa s~ɕiktaj mħtuw ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj βwaj na trakis~ɕ la kβwajun βwaj na trakis~ɕ s~ɕikmwa tʔruŋ rħijal qu tunux nja trakis~ɕ trakis~ɕ mus~ɕa s~ɕaku ps~ɕuluŋ s~ɕunan trʔroq inluŋan mu, nja na pβwajun βwaj na trakis~ɕ ins~ɕuna tninun mu trakis~ɕ trakis~ɕ uŋat kkjalan kmajal s~ɕinrxan s~ɕu, qutux ʦ~ʨipuq nqu βwaj trakis~ɕ ɣa qutux nqu tajal, nanu s~ɕiki ps~ɕqutux inluŋan kwara tajal, tħujaj s~ɕrħu βalaj tas~ɕaw ru pinqas~ɕan ʦ~ʨinqlaŋan na tajal
